description: Address review feedback: add application-level duplicate check for MySQL compatibility, make IntegrityError catch more specific, and add integration test for DuplicateJobError route handling.
steps: 1. Add has_active_job(job_type) function in jobs_service.py that checks for existing active jobs before insert.
2. Update create_job to call has_active_job before insert and raise DuplicateJobError if active.
3. Make the IntegrityError catch more specific by checking constraint name in the error message.
4. Add integration test for DuplicateJobError route handling in test_jobs_routes.py.
acceptance_criteria: has_active_job function exists and queries for pending/running jobs of the same type
create_job calls has_active_job before inserting and raises DuplicateJobError if active
IntegrityError catch checks for idx_unique_active_job constraint name before raising DuplicateJobError
Integration test verifies DuplicateJobError flashes warning and redirects
All existing tests continue to pass
findings: All 585 tests pass. The has_active_job check provides MySQL-compatible enforcement, while the partial index remains as a safety net for SQLite (tests) and any future PostgreSQL migration. The IntegrityError catch now only converts to DuplicateJobError when the constraint name matches.
